name: 2 Fat 2 Fly
overview: Best friends Ramone Dickerson and Corey Simmons navigate the triumphs and challenges of their small-town food truck business, 2 Fat 2 Fly. The Columbia, South Carolina, duo invented a revolutionary twist on a culinary classic: stuffed chicken wings.

trailers.title: Full Episode: "Ready for Takeoff?" (Ep. 1) | 2 Fat 2 Fly | OWN: Oprah Winfrey Network
